turns.speaker: Host
turns.text: We'd love for you to join us for dinner this Saturday!

turns.speaker: Guest
turns.text: That's so thoughtful of you, thank you for thinking of me. I'm afraid I already have plans, but I truly appreciate the invitation.

turns.speaker: Host
turns.text: Of course, maybe next time then.

turns.speaker: Guest
turns.text: I would love that. Thank you again, and please give my warm regards to everyone.
